title: Combined 8-Document Goldset (200 QA)
description: Merged from dev-gold-corpus4-100-v1 and dev-gold-corpus4_2-100-v1. 8 DIFC documents, 200 questions.

references.question: Do both texts add a later dedicated section for definitions or interpretation rather than keeping definitions only in the opening pages?

references.answer: The CRS regulations set reporting and due-diligence rules for financial accounts, while the partnership law governs formation, administration, and dissolution of general partnerships.

references.answer: The CRS regulations use an annex for extra definitions, while the General Partnership Law uses schedules for interpretation, defined terms, and contraventions with fines.
